_comment_schema: All fields below are OPTIONAL. Missing fields fall through to the embedded prompts in the app. You only need to include the prompts you want to override. Templates support {{placeholder}} substitution — the supported placeholders are documented in the comments below.
_comment_quintessence_layered: 5-Layer reading system prompt. Same placeholders as quintessence_simple.
_comment_living_mirror: Living Mirror synthesis prompt. No placeholders.
_comment_base_system: Shared tone/constraints preamble used across prompts. No placeholders.
_comment_adt_full_framework: Full ADT framework injected when a user has no established profile yet (seeding mode). No placeholders.
_comment_adt_signal_extraction_spec: JSON fragment appended to reading output spec so Claude returns ADT signals. Starts with a comma.
_comment_adt_calibration_template: Condensed per-reading calibration block for users with an established profile. Placeholders: {{stage_range}}, {{confidence}}, {{entry_count}}, {{paradox_tolerance}}, {{self_reflective_depth}}, {{framework_relationship}}, {{abstraction_ceiling}}, {{vocabulary_tier}}, {{interpretation_depth}}, {{inquiry_vs_directive}}, {{productive_tensions}}, {{band_guidance}}, {{stretch_guidance}}, {{stage_cautions}}, {{seed_context}}, {{milestone_context}}
_comment_adt_daemon_tone_template: Daemon chat tone calibration block. Placeholders: {{stage_range}}, {{vocabulary_tier}}, {{inquiry_vs_directive}}, {{paradox_tolerance}}, {{productive_tensions}}
_comment_adt_band_guidance: Per-band Oracle calibration strings. Keys: band_1 through band_5. No placeholders.
_comment_adt_stretch_guidance: Per-band-transition developmental stretch guidance. Keys: stretch_1_to_2, stretch_2_to_3, stretch_3_to_4, stretch_4_to_5, stretch_5_ceiling. No placeholders.
